breakdown: This PR refactors level-up pipeline logic by moving state flag helpers (_is_state_flag_false/true), resolve_level_up_signal, and related functions from game_state.py into a dedicated rewards_engine module, improving single-responsibility. The architectural changes show good separation of concerns with clean imports in world_logic.py. However, the diff lacks type annotations, has minimal documentation beyond one docstring, and test changes focus on import regression rather than testing the refactored logic itself.
key_changes: Move resolve_level_up_signal from game_state to rewards_engine
Add new imports in world_logic.py from rewards_engine: ensure_rewards_box, normalize_rewards_box, is_level_up_active, project_level_up_ui
Update test names from streaming_orchestrator to llm_parser in test_startup_import_regression.py
